name: System Design Framework
use_for: Use this framework for any system design question involving AI components. The full motion with rough time budget per phase:
summary: Use this framework for any system design question involving AI components. The full motion with rough time budget per phase:

phases.name: Scope and Clarify
phases.purpose: Narrow the problem space and show you think before you build.

phases.name: Prioritize Requirements
phases.purpose: Identify what matters most and design toward it.

phases.name: Initial Architecture
phases.purpose: Draw the high-level system before diving into details.

phases.name: Deep Dive into Critical Paths
phases.purpose: Show depth on the most important parts.

phases.name: Evaluation and Observability
phases.purpose: Show you think about production operations.

anti_patterns: Jumping straight into architecture without understanding requirements.

name: Concept Explanation Framework
use_for: Use this for conceptual questions like "Explain RAG" or "What is speculative decoding?"
summary: Use this for conceptual questions like "Explain RAG" or "What is speculative decoding?"

name: Tradeoff Analysis Framework
use_for: When asked to compare options or justify a decision, use this structure.
summary: When asked to compare options or justify a decision, use this structure.

name: Behavioral Questions Framework
use_for: For behavioral questions in AI roles, use STAR-L (STAR + Learnings).
summary: For behavioral questions in AI roles, use STAR-L (STAR + Learnings).
